name: North County Savings Bank
description_short: North County Savings Bank is a community bank headquartered in Red Bud, IL, offering checking, savings, loans, and banking services across three Illinois locations.
description_long:
North County Savings Bank was chartered in 1887 as the Evansville Building & Loan Association, operating from the former Pautler Hotel in Evansville, Illinois. In 1973, the institution expanded to Red Bud, Illinois, which became its home office, while maintaining a branch in Evansville. The bank has evolved from its original savings and loan model to offer comprehensive full-service banking services while maintaining its commitment to personalized customer service.

The bank provides deposit accounts including checking, savings and investment products, and retirement accounts. On the lending side, they offer various loan products with tools like a mortgage calculator and budget calculator available online. Their service offerings include online bill pay, check ordering, mobile banking apps, card management tools, safe deposit boxes, money orders, and utility bill payment acceptance. The bank also maintains a Community Reinvestment Notice reflecting compliance with Illinois Department of Financial and Professional Regulation requirements.

North County Savings Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on personal assistance to customers as a stated priority, despite offering services comparable to larger full-service institutions. The bank operates a lean three-branch footprint focused on the Illinois counties it serves, suggesting a hyper-local community banking approach rather than regional expansion.

The bank is currently experiencing operational challenges, with the Evansville branch scheduled to close on February 7, 2026, due to staffing shortages. This closure is significant as Evansville is where the institution was founded nearly 140 years ago. Customers should note that only the Red Bud location will maintain full lobby and drive-up hours post-closure, while the Ruma branch will operate drive-up only. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Card Valet app for card management
pros: Over 135 years of banking history and community presence since 1887
Personalized customer service prioritized over transactional efficiency
Online bill pay and mobile app services available for digital banking
Competitive safe deposit box pricing ($10-$25 annually)
Free bank checks service (no monthly or per-check fees)
Mortgage calculator and budget calculator tools available online
Accepts Red Bud utility bills and real estate tax payments at local offices
cons: Evansville branch closing February 7, 2026, due to staffing shortage, eliminating original location
Only three branches across Illinois limits geographic accessibility for most consumers
Limited information available on loan rates, terms, APY for deposit accounts, or credit requirements
Ruma branch limited to drive-up only operations post-closure announcement
No mention of FDIC insurance, online security certifications, or regulatory ratings on website

contact.address: 411 W Market St, Red Bud, IL 62278

best_for: Residents of Red Bud, Ruma, or Evansville, Illinois seeking local community banking
Customers prioritizing personalized service over digital-first banking experiences
Small business owners in southern Illinois requiring local lending relationships
diagnosis: North County Savings Bank is best for residents of the three-county Illinois area it serves who value personal relationships with local bankers and are willing to accept limited branch access. The main caveat is the ongoing branch consolidation crisis—the upcoming Evansville closure signals potential operational or financial stress that warrants caution before opening new accounts, particularly given the lack of published financial ratings or transparent terms on their website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 411 W Market St, Red Bud, IL 62278
